reference: My uncle was just released from the hospital today. He came home still very dizzy and weak. He has congestive heart failure and had a heart attack on Monday morning. He has also lost a lot of blood from a bleed somewhere they cannot find. He also has a lot of swelling in his right foot and ankle. Is there anything else we should watch for as a sign that it is time to take him back to the hospital?
text: While the property was in good shape, the actual dirt was not, and the grass was often not the greenest of all.
